title: Universal Hobby Mini Bead Crimping Pliers Carbon Steel Jewelry Making Tool
description:
Create beautiful jewelry with the Universal Hobby Mini Bead Crimping Pliers! This pair of pliers is constructed of durable 50 carbon steel and has a hardness of 40-42. They will easily close crimp beads and crimp tubes for a quality finish. The handle features a comfortable textured grip to add traction and decreases hand fatigue over extended use. The pliers even have a torsion spring to help with pressure control. This is a must-have tool for all jewelry makers and hobby crafters!
